title: Domostroi: How to Order Your House and Your Soul
description: The Russian household manual: practical wisdom on governance, piety, hospitality, and the ordering of domestic life.
introduction: The Russian household manual: practical wisdom on governance, piety, hospitality, and the ordering of domestic life.

translation.original_text: Благословляю я, грешный, и поучаю, и наказую, и вразумляю сына своего.
translation.text: I, a sinner, bless and instruct and admonish and enlighten my son.
